items.name_en: Goyard Yatou, the VILLETTE tote bag offers a large capacity. It can be carried by hand or over the shoulder, suitable for both men and women. It is double-sided, with the Hulot pattern side offering a relaxed casual style, and the Goyardine canvas side (without the Hulot pattern) being understated and elegant.
items.name_cn:
Goyard Yatou, the VILLETTE tote bag offers a large capacity. It can be carried by hand or over the shoulder, suitable for both men and women. It is double-sided, with the Hulot pattern side offering a relaxed casual style, and the Goyardine canvas side (without the Hulot pattern) being understated and elegant.
32 cm x 15 cm x 45 cm

items.name_en: Anjou Mini Limited Customization - Coral Pink
items.name_cn:
Anjou Mini Limited Customization - Coral Pink
Double-sided mini tote. The patterned side features custom high-quality rain wash linen consistent with ZP, finished with a glossy shellac [Witty] giving a grainy texture comparable to ZP, achieving a look that is both shiny and matte 🤟. The leather is made of top-grain calfskin 👛 soft and not prickly 💪. With custom hand-painted designs, one bag offers three styles. Includes bag charm and card holder 🎀➕gift box 🎁➕upgraded manual 💌
Size: Top opening 28cm, Base 20*Height 20*Base width 10cm
🔎020660

items.name_en: 🔔New Upgrade🔔 Includes bag charm and card holder🎀➕Gift box🎁➕Upgraded manual💌
items.name_cn:
🔔New Upgrade🔔 Includes bag charm and card holder🎀➕Gift box🎁➕Upgraded manual💌
❤️Goyard has undergone multiple research and improvements, continuously upgrading fabric and leather to meet high-quality requirements with exclusive customizationTM️🔝🔝
Base fabric uses high-quality custom rain-washed linen consistent with ZP〽️, coated with glossy shellac [Witty] The grain texture rivals ZP, achieving a look that is both glossy and matte🤟.
